# Vendored third-party assets

- **maplibre-gl.js / maplibre-gl.css** — MapLibre GL JS v4.7.1, BSD-3-Clause.
  Vendored so the explorer shell is fully self-contained (no CDN at runtime).
  Source: https://unpkg.com/maplibre-gl@4.7.1/dist/
  Licence: https://github.com/maplibre/maplibre-gl-js/blob/v4.7.1/LICENSE.txt

To update, re-download both files at a pinned version and bump this note.
